screen_metadata.name: Payroll Distribution Worksheet & Compensation Rules Center

1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px analytical accounting and matrix layout)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Two-Column Split Worksheet Shell (Left Workspace Panel: Active Multi-Tenant Payroll Execution Grid tracking individual employee calculations; Right Contextual Sidebar Panel: Compensation Rule Builder & Statutory Tax Bracket Configurator; Top Action Toolbar: Global Pay-Period Matrix Selector & Outbox Bank Wire Dispatch Controls)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Renders concurrent calculation grids and tax multiplier configurations side-by-side cleanly)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (The right rule configurator switches to a sliding drawer model to preserve multi-column vertical digit row alignments inside the primary ledger spreadsheet)

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify active payroll supervisor or financial controller security clearance -> Inherit multi-tenant entity parameters scope -> Execute state request payload fetch from HumanResourceService.getPayrollRun()
user_progression_routes.on_rule_modifier_change: Execute localized cell calculation script workflows loops to re-evaluate net pay balances, updating the spreadsheet matrix inline instantly

redirection_rules.condition: If an individual employee net payroll output results in a negative numeric modifier value (Deduction Overdraft Fault)
redirection_rules.action: Intercept batch compilation cycles instantly, highlight target cell block layout parameters style context inline as 'Arithmetic Calculation Exception', and lock execution wire triggers

modal_and_drawer_overlays.trigger: User strikes action toolbar command element 'btn_commit_payroll_run'
modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop center validation wizard dialogue modal enforcing final dual-factor signing parameters configurations before flushing the outbox and emitting balancing entries downstream to the General Ledger

atoms.type: Tabular Intercepting Numeric Input Box Form Component
Functional Core Action Core Button Element

molecules.composition: Combines employee identity serial code text link + baseline base salary label cell + variable overtime calculation value cell + statutory tax calculation cell + benefit parameters offset text node + calculated net payout display row component
Combines regional authority label text string + marginal bracket selector percentage box + maximum floor ceiling limit modifier input box

organisms.composition: Dynamic high-density calculating spreadsheet table grid tracking personnel metrics rows looping across database objects matrices, complete with interactive column filters and inline macro selection checkboxes loops.
Interactive vertical stack panel tracking fixed bonus calculation multipliers, statutory local tax guidelines schedules groupings, and local insurance rate sliders tools.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, sans-serif (Precision monospaced fonts stack used strictly on all calculation columns fields, net pay labels, and banking fields entries to preserve strict vertical spreadsheet matrix row grid alignments perfectly)

scales.outlay_large_monetary_analytics: font-size: 1.625rem (26px) | font-weight: 800 | tracking: tightly packed numerical monospace metrics

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid Frame)
color_palette_hex.surface_panels_elevated: #1E293B (Slate Matrix Boundary Panel Grid Workspace Layer Container)
color_palette_hex.payroll_payout_green: #10B981 (Emerald Green Secure Capital Outlay Success Anchor Focus Hue Accent)
color_palette_hex.calculation_exception_crimson: #EF4444 (Crimson Red Balance Overdraft/Tax Rule Violation Highline Alert Status Glow Border)
color_palette_hex.rule_modifier_indigo: #6366F1 (Indigo Blue Active Compensation Rule Allocation Path Accent Theme)

spacing_and_borders.standard_padding_unit: 1rem (16px standard component catalog dashboard layout frame margins padding unit metrics)
spacing_and_borders.calculating_spreadsheet_row_height: 2.375rem (38px high-density vertical row parameters layout cell bounds)
spacing_and_borders.border_style_token: 1px solid #334155 (Slate Matrix Border Alignment Configuration Component Framework Partition Separators Layout Line)

micro_interactions.style_mutation: background-color properties transform settings focus pointer map value to #334155 using an immediate 90ms execution curves duration window parameter
border outline updates framework metrics instantly to color value #3B82F6 highlight tone highlighting selected box container elements layers

accessibility_aria_roles.payroll_run_calculation_grid_canvas: role='grid' housing multi-column extensive calculating workforce compensation inventory configurations records matrices
accessibility_aria_roles.corporate_compensation_rule_builder_work: role='region' accompanied by explicit aria-live='polite' configuration fields monitoring real-time benefit rules modifications parameters models

local_reactive_state_variables.active_payroll_row_pointer_index: Tracks currently focused spreadsheet cell lookup row identification key string used to evaluate individual employee formulas (string | null default pointer value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_finalize_modal_visible: Boolean state variable tracking presentation configurations parameters toggling the multi-step verification payroll submission confirmation modal sheet overlays
local_reactive_state_variables.payroll_lines_collection_buffer: Reactive array collection caching ongoing overtime offsets updates, checking tax parameter modifications, and applying custom withholding overrides filters instantly

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared enterprise system global multi-tenant business scope token variable controlling schema isolation domain values cross microservice runtime executions
global_application_context_bindings.prj_validated_timesheet_shared_buffer: Global storage context data cache allocating approved project consultant hours and timesheet records parameters locally to verify compensation calculation accuracy levels across domain boundaries

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 presentation layers combined with standard Tailwind CSS utility grid structures writing layout variables logic natively via modern ES6 client-side asynchronous module scripts deploying precise calculation string abstractions to permanently discard rounding floating-point errors across large corporate payroll ledger summaries math branches
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Recalculating macro period net payout blocks metrics over a 1,500 row workforce calculation canvas following a rule modification update trigger must execute computation cycles frames under a target threshold limit parameter of 14ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Pass active row cell metadata indices mapping parameters into local active_payroll_row_pointer_index tracker parameters flags, illuminating corresponding fields indicators matches inside sidebar sheets

Mutate local state variable flag configuration is_finalize_modal_visible tracker modifier parameter value to true to present layout system payroll close modal terminal frames instantly on screen layers

Broadcast secure transaction command packets outward to system asynchronous message broker streams; overwrite matching row indicators inline tracking variables updating indicators metrics to `DISPATCHED` within local data storage cache collections arrays; close modal layout overlays windows

element_interaction_links.navigates_to_route: /auth/governance (Complete human asset and payroll operations tracking rotation; advance router context coordinates tracking parameters forward out of corporate operations subdomain directly into the final system core framework security and infrastructure gate: AUTH Screen AUTH_SCR_001 Viewport Layout Panel Configuration View)
